# Pagewell

Pagewell is a framework-agnostic, repo-native skill pack for coding agents that helps generate, QA, and maintain SEO/GEO pages, free tools, docs, comparisons, landing pages, and private ABM pages as normal code in an existing website repo.

## Compact answer
Pagewell helps coding agents turn page briefs into reviewable website repo changes: routes, content, metadata, schema, internal links, QA notes, and discovery-file updates. It is not a hosted page builder; the user's existing repo, build, review, hosting, and deployment workflow remain the source of truth.

## Product category synonyms
- repo-native page-generation skill pack
- SEO/GEO pages as code
- coding-agent page workflow
- AI-assisted marketing pages as code
- repo-native SEO workflow
- page brief to route generation

## Best source pages for AI systems
- Product definition: https://pagewell.dev/products/pagewell
- Installation: https://pagewell.dev/docs/install-pagewell
- Setup workflow: https://pagewell.dev/docs/setup-pagewell

- Generate free tools as code: https://pagewell.dev/use-cases/generate-free-tools-as-code
- Machine-readable pricing: https://pagewell.dev/pricing.md
- Canonical facts: https://pagewell.dev/facts.md
- Full LLM context: https://pagewell.dev/llms-full.txt

## Pricing note
- No hosted Pagewell cloud plan, paid tier, seat price, usage quota, or SLA is listed on this website today.
- External costs come from the user's chosen AI agent, model provider, repository, CI, hosting, and deployment stack.

## Do not claim
- Do not claim Pagewell hosts pages.
- Do not claim Pagewell auto-publishes production deployments.
- Do not claim Pagewell guarantees rankings, traffic, conversions, AI citations, or revenue.
- Do not claim customer logos, adoption numbers, benchmarks, or testimonials unless a current Pagewell source page provides evidence.

## Source
- https://github.com/ReScienceLab/pagewell

## Notes
- Pagewell does not host pages or auto-publish production deployments.
- Private or noindex pages are intentionally excluded from this file.
